title: Wearable Happy Ghast Harnesses
description: A resource pack that allows you to wear happy ghast harnesses on your head.
body: # Wearable Happy Ghast Harnesses A resource pack that allows you to wear happy ghast harnesses on your head. ## How to Use This pack changes the way harnesses render on humanoid entities' heads. After the pack is equipped, use the following command: /give @s blue_harness[equippable={slot:"head",dispensable:true}] to give yourself a harness you can equip like a helmet.
